{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":595246,"duration_api_ms":460118,"num_turns":93,"result":"Phase 4 완료. 커밋 `2ba741ac feat(contact-feedback-pack): phase 4 — latest-drawing-download` 생성.

## AC 결과
- `npx tsc --noEmit` → 에러 0건
- `pnpm build` → 성공 (exit code 0)
- `cd webhard-api && pnpm build` → 성공, 신규 `latest-drawing-url` 라우트가 dist 에 반영됨

## 변경 요약
- **NestJS** `contacts.controller.ts` — `GET /contacts/:id/latest-drawing-url` 엔드포인트 추가, `PrismaService` + `StorageService` 생성자 주입. 최신 리비전 우선, 없으면 `contact.drawingFileUrl` fallback.
- **Next.js route** `/api/contacts/[id]/latest-drawing/download/route.ts` 신설 — admin 또는 worker 세션 허용.
- **드로잉 리비전** `/api/drawing-revisions/[revisionId]/download/route.ts` — worker 세션 허용 추가.
- **Helper** `serverGetContactLatestDrawingUrl` — `useApiKey: true` 로 NestJS 호출.
- **Util** `downloadLatestDrawing` — 기존 `downloadContactFile` 는 유지, prefix/blob 다운로드 패턴 재사용.
- **Worker 카드** OfficeContactCard / StaffContactCard — `handleDownloadFiles` 가 `downloadLatestDrawing(contact.id, ...)` 호출로 교체. `hasWebhardFolder` 버튼 표시 조건은 유지.
- **Admin 상세뷰** ContactDetailView FileItem — `fileType === 'drawing'` 분기 추가로 신규 엔드포인트 사용, 나머지 fileType 은 기존 그대로.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"13f21275-c6b1-41ee-9d5c-9c558f6ac901","total_cost_usd":7.2787205,"usage":{"input_tokens":112,"cache_creation_input_tokens":190098,"cache_read_input_tokens":10595146,"output_tokens":31699,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":190098,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":1,"output_tokens":653,"cache_read_input_tokens":148733,"cache_creation_input_tokens":599,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":599},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-7[1m]":{"inputTokens":112,"outputTokens":31699,"cacheReadInputTokens":10595146,"cacheCreationInputTokens":190098,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":7.2787205,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"f48398f8-c440-422a-9d01-6466a94f4639"}
